'''Blleen''' was a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] at the [[Citadel of B'omarr]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
He saw to the recuperation of [[Spiker]] after the [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]] incident.

{{Char-stub}}
